diff --git a/inspect_bias_v2.py b/inspect_bias_v2.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4198c8c

+++ b/inspect_bias_v2.py
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+import torch
+
+try:
+    bias_orig = torch.load("bias_orig.pt", weights_only=True)
+    bias = torch.load("bias.pt", weights_only=True)
+
+    print(f"bias_orig[3072]: {bias_orig[3072]}")
+    print(f"bias[1]: {bias[1]}")
+
+    N = 18432
+    num_blocks = 6
+    block_size = N // num_blocks
+    
+    # Try the permutation
+    bias_view = bias_orig.view(num_blocks, block_size)
+    bias_permuted = bias_view.permute(1, 0).reshape(-1)
+    
+    print(f"bias_permuted shape: {bias_permuted.shape}")
+    print(f"bias_permuted first 10: {bias_permuted[:10]}")
+    
+    # Compare with target bias
+    diff = (bias_permuted - bias).abs()
+    print(f"Max difference: {diff.max()}")
+    print(f"Mean difference: {diff.mean()}")
+    
+    # Check if they are exactly equal
+    print(f"Equal? {torch.equal(bias_permuted, bias)}")
+
+except Exception as e:
+    print(f"Error: {e}")

+++ b/inspect_diff.py
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+import torch
+
+bias = torch.load("bias.pt", weights_only=True)
+bias_orig = torch.load("bias_orig.pt", weights_only=True)
+
+N = 18432
+num_blocks = 6
+block_size = N // num_blocks
+bias_view = bias_orig.view(num_blocks, block_size)
+bias_permuted = bias_view.permute(1, 0).reshape(-1)
+
+# Check block 1 (indices 1::6)
+idx_1 = torch.arange(1, len(bias), 6)
+diff_1 = bias[idx_1] - bias_permuted[idx_1]
+print(f"Diff at 1::6 (first 10): {diff_1[:10]}")
+print(f"Mean diff at 1::6: {diff_1.mean()}")
+print(f"Std diff at 1::6: {diff_1.std()}")
+print(f"Unique diffs rounded: {torch.unique(diff_1.round(decimals=1))}")
+
+# Check block 4 (indices 4::6)
+idx_4 = torch.arange(4, len(bias), 6)
+diff_4 = bias[idx_4] - bias_permuted[idx_4]
+print(f"Diff at 4::6 (first 10): {diff_4[:10]}")
+print(f"Mean diff at 4::6: {diff_4.mean()}")
+print(f"Std diff at 4::6: {diff_4.std()}")
+print(f"Unique diffs rounded: {torch.unique(diff_4.round(decimals=1))}")
+

@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+import torch
+
+bias_orig = torch.load("bias_orig.pt", weights_only=True)
+bias = torch.load("bias.pt", weights_only=True)
+
+# Check if 0.9883 is in bias_orig
+val = bias[1]
+print(f"Value at bias[1]: {val}")
+matches = (bias_orig == val).nonzero()
+print(f"Indices in bias_orig matching {val}: {matches}")
+
+# Check value at bias[4]
+val4 = bias[4]
+print(f"Value at bias[4]: {val4}")
+matches4 = (bias_orig == val4).nonzero()
+print(f"Indices in bias_orig matching {val4}: {matches4}")
+
+# Check ranges
+# Block 1: 3072 to 6144
+# Block 4: 12288 to 15360
+
+print("Sample Block 1 orig:", bias_orig[3072:3082])
+print("Sample Block 4 orig:", bias_orig[12288:12298])
+
+# Let's see what bias has at the indices corresponding to these blocks after permutation
+# The permutation maps:
+# bias_permuted[1] <= bias_orig[3072]
+# bias_permuted[4] <= bias_orig[12288]
+# But bias[1] != bias_orig[3072]
+
+# Maybe the block order is different?
+# If we look at bias[1], it is 0.9883.
+# If we look at bias[4], it is 0.9883.
+

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+import torch
+
+bias = torch.load("bias.pt", weights_only=True)
+
+# Check indices 1::6
+idx_1 = torch.arange(1, len(bias), 6)
+vals_1 = bias[idx_1]
+print(f"Values at indices 1::6: {vals_1[:10]}")
+print(f"Are all 1::6 values same? {torch.unique(vals_1).numel() == 1}")
+print(f"Unique values at 1::6: {torch.unique(vals_1)}")
+
+# Check indices 4::6
+idx_4 = torch.arange(4, len(bias), 6)
+vals_4 = bias[idx_4]
+print(f"Values at indices 4::6: {vals_4[:10]}")
+print(f"Are all 4::6 values same? {torch.unique(vals_4).numel() == 1}")
+print(f"Unique values at 4::6: {torch.unique(vals_4)}")
+
+# Check other indices to make sure they match bias_orig
+# We know 0, 2, 3, 5 match based on previous check
+bias_orig = torch.load("bias_orig.pt", weights_only=True)
+N = 18432
+num_blocks = 6
+block_size = N // num_blocks
+bias_view = bias_orig.view(num_blocks, block_size)
+bias_permuted = bias_view.permute(1, 0).reshape(-1)
+
+idx_0 = torch.arange(0, len(bias), 6)
+diff_0 = (bias[idx_0] - bias_permuted[idx_0]).abs()
+print(f"Max diff at 0::6: {diff_0.max()}")
+
+idx_2 = torch.arange(2, len(bias), 6)
+diff_2 = (bias[idx_2] - bias_permuted[idx_2]).abs()
+print(f"Max diff at 2::6: {diff_2.max()}")
+
diff --git a/permute_bias.py b/permute_bias.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..2e4776a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/permute_bias.py
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+import torch
+import argparse
+
+def main():
+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
+    parser.add_argument("--input", type=str, default="bias_orig.pt", help="Input bias file")
+    parser.add_argument("--target", type=str, default="bias.pt", help="Target bias file for verification")
+    parser.add_argument("--output", type=str, default="bias_permuted.pt", help="Output bias file")
+    args = parser.parse_args()
+
+    print(f"Loading {args.input}...")
+    bias_orig = torch.load(args.input, weights_only=True)
+
+    N = bias_orig.shape[0]
+    num_blocks = 6
+    block_size = N // num_blocks
+    
+    print(f"Reshaping to ({num_blocks}, {block_size})...")
+    bias_view = bias_orig.view(num_blocks, block_size).clone()
+
+    # Apply correction observed from analysis: Blocks 1 and 4 have +1.0 added
+    print("Adding 1.0 to blocks 1 and 4...")
+    bias_view[1] += 1.0
+    bias_view[4] += 1.0
+
+    print("Permuting...")
+    bias_permuted = bias_view.permute(1, 0).reshape(-1)
+
+    # Verify against target if available
+    try:
+        target_bias = torch.load(args.target, weights_only=True)
+        if torch.equal(target_bias, bias_permuted):
+            print(f"SUCCESS: Generated bias matches {args.target} exactly.")
+        else:
+            print(f"WARNING: Generated bias does NOT match {args.target} exactly.")
+            diff = (target_bias - bias_permuted).abs()
+            print(f"Max difference: {diff.max()}")
+    except FileNotFoundError:
+        print(f"Target file {args.target} not found, skipping verification.")
+
+    print(f"Saving to {args.output}...")
+    torch.save(bias_permuted, args.output)
+    print("Done.")
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    main()
diff --git a/verify_solution.py b/verify_solution.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..c5f1119
--- /dev/null
+++ b/verify_solution.py
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+import torch
+
+def process_bias():
+    bias_orig = torch.load("bias_orig.pt", weights_only=True)
+    N = 18432
+    num_blocks = 6
+    block_size = N // num_blocks
+
+    # Reshape
+    bias_view = bias_orig.view(num_blocks, block_size).clone()
+
+    # Add 1.0 to blocks 1 and 4
+    bias_view[1] += 1.0
+    bias_view[4] += 1.0
+
+    # Permute
+    bias_permuted = bias_view.permute(1, 0).reshape(-1)
+
+    return bias_permuted
+
+def main():
+    target_bias = torch.load("bias.pt", weights_only=True)
+    my_bias = process_bias()
+
+    if torch.equal(target_bias, my_bias):
+        print("SUCCESS: Result matches bias.pt exactly.")
+    else:
+        print("FAILURE: Result does not match.")
+        diff = (target_bias - my_bias).abs()
+        print(f"Max diff: {diff.max()}")
+        print(f"Num mismatches: {(target_bias != my_bias).sum()}")
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    main()
